steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to provide a quotation from chapter 17. The notes tell us chapter 17 is about various skeptics' takes on nostalgia, and it contains this line: "The poethics of nostalgia combines estrangement and human solidarity, affect and reflection." A valid answer must include that exact quotation.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "After discussing themes of nostalgia in Joseph Brodsky's writing, Svetlana Boym goes on to discuss various skeptics' takes on the concept of nostalgia.": No quotation is included. ✗
  • "Svetlana Boym's *The Future of Nostalgia* is a multifaced exploration of nostalgia.": No quotation is included, and it says nothing about chapter 17. ✗
  • "In an exploration of various skeptics' takes on the concept of nostalgia, Svetlana Boym writes, "The poethics of nostalgia combines estrangement and human solidarity, affect and reflection."": Includes the chapter 17 quotation and correctly identifies its context (skeptics' takes on nostalgia). ✓
  • "Svetlana Boym discusses themes of nostalgia in Joseph Brodsky's writing in chapter 14 of her book.": References chapter 14, not chapter 17, and includes no quotation. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
